title: neoporteria curvispina var. geissei
intro: Neoporteria curvispina var. geissei, also known as Geissea or Chilean iris, is a type of flowering cactus plant native to the central and southern regions of Chile. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neoporteria curvispina var. geissei are attributed to its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and grinding the leaves or roots to create infusions or decoctions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
